examples: Skeptics say these machines do not represent a great improvement over video teleconferencing.
Many argue that video teleconferencing and instant messaging have replaced the need for virtual world interaction.
Depending on circumstances, this could be achieved through email, teleconferencing or other Internet-based communication.
In addition to press releases, these methods include, among others, Internet webcasting and teleconferencing.
It also includes features for screensharing during presentations, transmitting videos, sharing files, teleconferencing and accessing whiteboards.
